description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and angular lines. The body is constructed from a combination of metal and polymer, with a ventilated handguard and a prominent top rail for mounting optics. The magazine is a detachable box type, slightly angled and made from a gray polymer material. The rifle includes a pistol grip and a fixed stock, both ergonomically shaped for user comfort. The barrel is medium-length and appears to be of standard profile, with a small muzzle device attached. The sighting system consists of a simple iron sight mounted on the top rail.
description: A modern, matte black tactical rifle with a detachable box magazine, fixed stock, and iron sights. It features a ventilated handguard and a compact, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, ventilated handguard, and iron sight.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile, muzzle device, and the alignment of the handguard and top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and handguard details visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
